title: Contemporary Japan

contents.note: Frog in a Well (selected issues from 1941-1945)

additional-note: This is a Japanese publication. Its contents may still be copyrighted even without renewals or copyright notices, if they meet GATT copyright restoration requirements for works first published outside the US. However, US subscription rates are listed in many issues up until the spring of 1942, and an American vendor is mentioned in its pages until early 1943.  We are not sure when regular American distribution resumed after World War II.
acknowledgement: Thanks to Iren Sokolova for copyright research on this title.
